# Hieu suat luong tu cua SiPM (Photon Detection Efficiency - PDE)
# Thong so trich xuat tu datasheet Hamamatsu S13360-3050CS / SensL J-Series (Blue-sensitive, 50um/35um pitch)
# Muc Overvoltage (V_ov) tieu chuan = 3.0V
# Cot 1: Buoc song (nm), Cot 2: PDE (tu 0.0 den 1.0)
